content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.cad.translator
FILE: cosmos/integration/cad/translator.py (137 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: CAD Natural Language Translator.

Translates natural language to CadQuery code.

CLASSES:
- CADCommand: Translated CAD command.
- CADTranslator: Translate natural language to CadQuery operations.

Uses pattern matching for co
  Methods: def translate(self, natural_command: str) -> CADCommand
  Methods: async def translate_async(self, command: str) -> CADCommand
